query: 2026 gubernatorial debates scheduled summer 2026 Pennsylvania Shapiro Garrity, Oregon Kotek Drazan, Arizona Hobbs, Wisconsin - any debate before September 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the bottom line:

**No general-election gubernatorial debate is scheduled before September 2026 in any of the four states.** All confirmed general-election debate dates fall in October 2026, and where dates are unconfirmed, incumbents have declined or not committed to summer debates.

- **Pennsylvania (Shapiro vs. Garrity):** Both willing to debate at least once, but nothing scheduled as of June 2026. Garrity called for 7 debates; Shapiro's camp won't negotiate through the press.
- **Oregon (Kotek vs. Drazan):** Kotek proposed 3 debates (June 11) but explicitly **declined** an Oregon newspaper group's debate on June 18, citing a busy summer calendar. No general-election debate confirmed for summer.
- **Arizona (Hobbs vs. TBD):** Primary is July 21, 2026 — the GOP opponent isn't even determined yet. Hobbs had not committed to any general-election debate as of July 7–9.
- **Wisconsin (open seat):** Confirmed general-election debates are **Oct. 8 and Oct. 9, 2026**. Only *primary* debates occur before September (e.g., WISN 12 Democratic primary debate July 28).

The spring/summer 2026 debates that did occur were all **primary** debates, distinct from the general-election matchups. The earliest confirmed general-election debate across all four states is Wisconsin's on October 8, 2026.

key_facts: No general-election gubernatorial debate is scheduled before September 2026 in Pennsylvania, Oregon, Arizona, or Wisconsin as of mid-July 2026.
Pennsylvania: Shapiro and Garrity both said (June 2026) they are willing to debate at least once, but no debate is scheduled — no date, host, or moderator agreed. Garrity called for seven debates.

Oregon: Kotek proposed three televised debates on June 11, 2026, but on June 18, 2026 declined an Oregon newspaper group's debate, citing a busy summer calendar. No Kotek–Drazan general-election debate confirmed for summer.
Arizona: Primary is July 21, 2026, so Hobbs's general-election opponent was not yet determined in mid-July; Hobbs had not committed to any general-election debate as of July 7–9, 2026.

Wisconsin (open seat): Confirmed general-election debates are Oct. 8, 2026 (TMJ4/UW-Milwaukee town hall) and Oct. 9, 2026 (WBA Foundation/Milwaukee PBS). Only PRIMARY debates occur before September (e.g., WISN 12 Democratic primary debate July 28, 2026).
GOP primary debates occurred in spring/summer 2026 in Oregon (Apr 16, early May) and Arizona (June 17), but these are not general-election matchups.
All four states hold their general election on November 3, 2026.
The earliest confirmed general-election gubernatorial debate across the four states is in Wisconsin on October 8, 2026.
